race.comment: COMMANDER MEROO (13) settled well back last time out then found the line strongly to finish fifth over 1350m at Strathalbyn. Has solid peaks and can make a bright start for the new stable. ERION (10) fought on to score a narrow win at Bathurst over this track and trip last month. Freshened and is down in the weights this time so another big run is on the cards. INVINCIBLE SALEX (2) was safely held at Warren, following a win at Bathurst at the previous outing. Best figures measure up, so is worth another chance. HANUMAN (7) is capable of a much better performance this time. Keeping safe despite the wide draw.
